The '''Sabrin Ring''' was a territorial gang founded by [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Miletta Sabrin]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Their operations were limited to three [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Sabrixin system/Legends|Sabrixin system]] - [[Sabrix]], [[Elokas]] and [[Helisk]]. Their activities included dealing in large-scale extortion, credit laundering, forced labor and the manufacture of illegal goods.
